Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Continued To Mar-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Albert Kun appearing for Benefsha Gest. William Rogers appearing for and with Joshua Gest. Both counsel agreed on doing preliminary discovery and mediation. The Court asked if Pro Bono Mediation is appropriate. Mr. Kun stated he will prefer doing the discovery before Pro Bono Mediation. The matter was continued to 3/3. The Court wanted counsel to come in to report on status.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
